summary: Wired mobile quality scaling through the full render pipeline. computeQuality() is now called after signals resolve, producing a QualityProfile that drives: resolutionScale on the renderer pixel ratio (0.5/0.75/1.0), antialias disable heuristic for low-DPR touch devices, maxParticles (150/350/600) and enableSparkle on the particle field, maxWaves (10/20) on the wave field, and mode manager integration. The resize handler preserves the scaled pixel ratio across window resizes. LoopDeps now carries an optional quality profile. All 16 pending tests (T-025-09 through T-025-24) are implemented and passing alongside all 390 existing tests. Build succeeds with no TypeScript errors.
